prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young man with fair skin, messy brown hair, light stubble beard, and round black eyeglasses. His facial features are soft yet defined, with blue/grey eyes and a calm, focused expression. He is looking slightly upward and away from the camera, conveying quiet confidence.

Outfit: tailored black suit, crisp white shirt, black tie, clean and minimal styling.

Background: deep red gradient studio backdrop with subtle floating particles, faint dust, and cinematic haze.

Lighting: dramatic studio lighting with strong red rim light from behind outlining the hair and shoulders, soft diffused key light on the face, gentle shadows adding depth. Slight glow reflecting on glasses.

Composition: medium close-up, centered framing, slightly low-angle perspective to enhance presence and authority. Sharp focus on face, shallow depth of field.

Style: high-end editorial, luxury fashion campaign, hyper-detailed skin texture, realistic imperfections, 8K resolution, crisp and cinematic.

Mood: powerful, composed, mysterious, executive energy.

Camera: 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, studio quality, ultra sharp.

Color palette: dominant deep reds and blacks with natural skin tones, high contrast, cinematic grading.
